name: Eric Ming
subject: Million dollar fundraisers and unlimited amounts of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5) Yang Gang --

We’re facing several candidates who have wealthy donors holding fancy fundraisers, raising over a million dollars at a time.

One billionaire has threatened to spend “unlimited” amounts to win the nomination.

And just this week, we saw another billionaire announce he will spend $100 million across the country (and that’s whether he gets into the race or not). _Imagine what he will spend if he does announce he’s getting in the race._

**We know Andrew Yang has the right message, and he’s the right candidate for this moment -- and we have to go all in if we’re going to ensure he has the resources to get his message out in the face of this barrage of spending.**

[Can Andrew count on you to stand with him tonight by pitching in $10 or more before midnight? Donate now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16927?t=5&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5) | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16927?t=7&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5)
---
We don’t need to match them dollar for dollar, but we do need to raise enough to get Andrew’s message in front of the voters still deciding in Iowa, New Hampshire, and across the country.

Let’s do this together, Yang Gang, and show the country that a grassroots movement will not be stopped by any wealthy donor or billionaire.

Eric Ming
Digital and Paid Media Director
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16927?t=6&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3185%2E377263%2EKOWg_5) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

body:

| Hey there, it's Jenna again. I have an exciting update to share! **At this very moment, we are fewer than 15,000 donors away from the threshold to qualify for the December debate stage.** We've come a long way in the past week -- adding hundreds of first-time donors to this team every single day. Now, we can't slow down. **[Make your very first donation of $1 right now to join the more than 185,000 others who have already stepped up to help Cory secure his spot in the December debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191116_BHQ_20191116-fr-BHQ-donorupdate-actives_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The stakes are high here. name: Senator John Cornyn
subject: Do you care about Texas values?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MTM2MDY4MTk1LjE1NzQ5NmUzYWI1NjZlNTRkZjhhOGE5ZGEyMmI2NDkyJm49VCZsPWEtZ3Mmbz02NjE2OTUz&x=3b71c931)

Friend,
For far too long, the liberal elites of this country have been trying to silence the conservative voice of this country. The silent majority deserves to have their voice heard!
In order to better represent you, my team has prepared a survey that will allow us to get a full picture of what issues Texans truly care about. Share your thoughts on what are the greatest issues facing our country and what we can do to fix them.
[**Friend, I need to know what you value, so I can best represent you in the Senate. Will you take my priorities survey now?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/114953/2/)
**As you can see, Texas is at the top of Democrats' minds and they will stop at nothing until they turn Texas blue. **
**SURVEY SELECTION**

FIRST NAME: Friend
EMAIL:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/114954/3/)
SURVEY COMPLETE:PENDING
---

Will you take a moment and make a true impact by completing our survey?

****[TAKE THE PRIORITIES SURVEY](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/114955/4/)****
---
I have always pledged to fight for Texans every step of the way. The hard-working men and women of Texas give hope to all of America. Let me continue sharing your voice and values for all of America to hear, so let me know which issues you care about the most.
[**In order to best represent all Texans, I need to know where you stand. Friend, will you take my survey so I can best represent all Texans? **](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/114956/5/)
Thank you, friend.
\-- Senator John Cornyn

Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](www.johncornyn.com/november-priorities-survey/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=prosp_TVR-GS&utm_campaign=txsencornyn_TVR-GS_20191117_prioritiesprospsa_john&utm_content=4_4). With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/55061/6/) and [Twitter](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/55062/7/) - that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6616953/136068195/55064/9/) and find out exactly how you can help. name: Jason Yates
subject: An opportunity to equip a Christian voter
body:
| It’s your moment to make a difference | Peter, Giving Tuesday is one week from today. Are you ready to be a part of this historic day? Giving Tuesday started in 2012 as a simple idea in America: a day that encourages people to do good by participating in charitable giving. Last year, nearly 400 million dollars was raised for non-profit organizations across the country in one day! **On #GivingTuesday, we’re inviting you to be part of the solution in our nation:_Equip a Christian voter._** There are days when it feels like unborn life won’t be fully protected, businesses won’t be able to operate according to their religious convictions, and the battle to defend God’s definition of gender and marriage is a lost cause. **BUT there are 90-million Christians in America - and if they voted, it would forever change the course of our nation.** You have a tremendous opportunity to influence our nation in 2020.
* All 435 seats in the U.S. House of Representatives are up for election.
* Thirty-five Senate seats will be determined.
* The President of the United States will be chosen.
* Tens of thousands of state and local elections will take place across the nation.

What can you do? **Equip a Christian voter with a gift of $3.20**. Maybe you can equip one voter, two voters, or more. Partner with us on #GivingTuesday and - for the cost of a cup of coffee - you’ll provide all the resources and tools to activate a Christian to vote in 2020. **Plan to donate on Tuesday, December 3, and join us in our 24-hour #GivingTuesday campaign.[Don’t want to miss the date? Get a head start now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd&n=1).** We can all do something, and when we do, we will influence the nation with God’s principles in 2020. body:

### Friend,
The final results are in from Louisiana’s election for Governor and Democrat John Bel Edwards surprised the nation by winning in another deeply red state. Just two weeks ago, Democrat Andy Beshear also shocked political pundits by defeating incumbent Matt Bevin in Kentucky. I want to be completely clear with you about what this means: States like Kentucky and Louisiana are states that were supposed to be a guarantee for the Republican party. But we sent a message that we can win anywhere and the best part is – West Virginia is about to be next. West Virginia Governor Jim Justice is the most unpopular governor in the country now that Matt Bevin has been sent packing but he is also West Virginia’s only billionaire and he is gearing up to spend his fortune to keep grip on power. We have to start building a grassroots campaign in West Virginia if we’re going to win like Beshear in Kentucky and Edwards in Louisiana. name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Join me to fight climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
The Jersey Shore is suffering from climate change. Let's protect our environment together.
|
---

| | Friends, Growing up in New Jersey, one of my favorite things to do was to spend summers at the Shore every summer. I even took my first steps on the boardwalk chasing my Dad's funnel cake. | [](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341dee/1622808851/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-climate-change?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em")
---
**The Shore represents so many things that I love about New Jersey** --evening strolls on the boardwalk, people from all walks of life gathering together, and local traditions supported by small, family-owned businesses, and of course all the treats: from saltwater taffy to funnel cake.
But these memories and traditions that we share and every summer spent at our beloved Shore are threatened by climate change.
[**We need leaders in Washington who will address the climate crisis with bold, swift action. Add your name to our petition if you agree:**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341ded/1622808851/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-climate-change?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+We+need+leaders+in+Washington+who+will+a&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em")
**[FIGHT CLIMATE CHANGE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341dec/1622808851/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-climate-change?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+FIGHT+CLIMATE+CHANGE&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em")**
---
Sky-rocketing temperatures, extreme weather, and increasing sea levels mean our communities are in harm's way.
Seven years ago, we witnessed the effects extreme weather can have on our community when Hurricane Sandy hit. More than one hundred people died, 200,000 homes were damaged, and it cost nearly $50 billion.
**It took many months to dig out from the destruction and many more to rebuild. Some families are still to this day struggling to recover.**
Our district is the epicenter of the climate crisis. We deserve a representative who will fight to protect our community from the impacts of climate change and swiftly work to mitigate and prevent further harms.
There is a lot of work to do, but when I go to Washington, I promise to champion the bold, urgent policies we need to address climate change.
[**Are you with me?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341deb/1622808851/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-climate-change?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Are+you+with+me&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em")
**[FIGHT CLIMATE CHANGE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341dea/1622808851/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+FIGHT+CLIMATE+CHANGE&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em")**
---
Onward,
Stephanie

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08e/522d4087/7afccf09/4f341de9/1622808851/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20191117_em&source=20191117_em") at any time._

subject: Susan Collins votes for another horrible Trump appointee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, Republican Susan Collins cast the deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court despite numerous credible accusations of sexual assault against him and an incomplete FBI investigation cut short by Mitch McConnell. Now, she's voted to confirm another horrible appointee, this time named Chad Wolf \-- the brains behind Trump's family separation policy. Because of her vote, he's officially the Department of Homeland Security Undersecretary for Strategy, Policy, and Plans, where he oversees even more critical immigration policy decisions. Susan Collins has time and time again betrayed the voters' trust, and she has a job approval rating of just 35% in Maine to show for it. With her term ending next year, _The Cook Political Report_ has classified her Senate seat as a "toss-up." This race in Maine is KEY to winning back the Senate, and Collins has never been this vulnerable! But Mitch McConnell knows his Senate majority depends on her, so he and the GOP will inundate the state with their usual dirty tricks, voter suppression, and an avalanche of dark money to hang on to power. Collins has had years in office to amass a warchest for this very moment, but she's in for the race of her life. Sara Gideon, the Democratic challenger, announced that she raised a whopping $3.2 million in Q3, with nearly 97% of those donations being less than $100 \-- donations from people like you who helped show Susan Collins that we won't stand for her any longer. [**Every dollar given goes toward helping Sara have another great grassroots showing so she can fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins. | Team,

We just ran the numbers, and it looks like we fell short of our $100,000 fundraising goal last night.

When Donald Trump rallied his donors to come to Cory Gardner's side and raise $100,000 for him, we knew we had to turn to our best supporters to help keep pace. We're not counting on special interests or corporate PACs to fund this campaign--we're relying on people like you.

**That 's why we set this goal last week, and that's why it's so important that we actually reach it. ❌ **Poll 3: National or Early State
❌ Poll 4: National or Early State **

[Pitch in now to help us qualify for the December debate.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16931?t=5&akid=3186%2E377263%2ESX7fPr) Yang Gang --

Without a doubt, the Democratic debates are the most widely watched and reported events in this race. They are our best chance to get Andrew out in front of millions of people -- many for the first time.

Each time you are able to contribute, we improve our position by making gains in qualifying polls for the December debate. We’re still two polls short.

subject: What a week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
While we had a lot to celebrate, this week has also been filled with tough reminders of how much work we have ahead of us. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2ws/YEFkT5-bRhiU4sJJNRxkYg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIvtgQQEkCsYRuHIUoaqO10ghyx4tcXVR9bglng1tj04DIqlf0iCTOqXWQAlTEdb-2F2JMxjVmkc9f9hjeexnShJoiDuOKqzm-2Bnih075PDgyhy2qBnu-2F-2FvSIozpWdMqLXsIaaReYj0y6IHl-2BbRfiVrLzU9rx3QxkGBQ3PDsWtIrYmSueNd34YIRftl8-2Feyy67SgNio3VdIBrwBZ9JVDOSZJA1RL-2FTFkyRgsXiHAH5CBhl-2Bw-3D/DrCk)
Friend, what a week. **We've been blown away by the response we received after releasing our new video.** It's clear a lot of people identify with Mondaire's message and agree that it's time to send more working-class champions to Congress. But, if we want that to happen, we need to make sure Mondaire has the resources to spread the word about his message and story. **_[Will you chip in $5 today to our people-powered campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2ws/YEFkT5-bRhiU4sJJNRxkYg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIvtgQQEkCsYRuHIUoaqO10ghyx4tcXVR9bglng1tj04AbemIggS-2FfLP8WMt-2FPYdx6KnVkSAL44H-2B2VJXbhlceaF7BKsnuRuCL4gJB5V2Ve9Y5Ip6SZAQzTV1yXw9fMnLgCzkeFKhf8j7kMfmyJCH0B9zKlTHvSm5w10JocTMKSS7UTZW39I1z8osk7Swtcgxx5PqSgLNR2Bi5ReVk-2F7GzROqXj6q5ESILypqOm7ZHTjk-3D/6IFm)_** [Give $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2ws/YEFkT5-bRhiU4sJJNRxkYg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIvtgQQEkCsYRuHIUoaqO10ghyx4tcXVR9bglng1tj04CyannHQ8kXSBqv4-2BrAs6ilz5TQcNBBbqGY-2Bg0BzhlnMixwOmPtVlNkQUSYTto6XX2m1eMYONRX-2B2mmzNAorLxYwCrSAx9EBVmTg6OvG2pINs9K0iCQtjgUJAGiAN7EhhRinRZdb57Qg-2BaoJ9KfRsx2z2xEsZ-2FntC9HkNrYF-2BVvRJafZLf77NuWCRXY9Bbg-2BHA-3D/Uyes) **While we had a lot to celebrate, this week has also been filled with tough reminders of how much work we have ahead of us.** Millions of Dreamers are waiting to hear if they're still welcome in the country they call home, the gun violence epidemic is continuing to spread in our communities, and we have a man in the White House who has made the focus of his term all about him, not about us. This upcoming week is going to be especially critical for our grassroots movement. Here's why:
1. **People who've watched Mondaire's video ad have said it was a powerful motivator to support his campaign.** We need to capitalize on this momentum; if we raise enough money, we can help this video keep spreading.

| | Donald Trump won in 2016 but lost the popular vote by millions -- and there's a possibility that could happen again: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Donald Trump won in 2016 but lost the popular vote by millions -- and there's a possibility that could happen again: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0651/72412298/4162c950/6103e158/3667261033/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/electoral_college_abolish?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191117_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191117_ElectoralCollege_U1_X1") The electoral college invalidates the democratic process -- but Republicans have only won the popular vote once since 1992, so they'll fight to keep it in place no matter what. I want to share a story from my first few weeks in the Senate. It's about my conversation with Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan.

So, I'm new, and Jamie Dimon comes to my office to talk about financial regulation. He thinks there's too much of it. I think there's too little.

After a long back-and-forth, I finally said to him,**"I think you guys are breaking the law."**

He relaxed, smiled, and sat back. **"So hit me with a fine," he said. "We can afford it."**

Our government isn't holding the rich and powerful to account. They know it, and we know it.

**But this campaign is our chance to change that -- to dream bigger, to rein in Wall Street, and to root out corruption.**

**[Will you chip in today to help power this campaign? subject: Call on Congress to lower prescription drug prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC

| | Peter, It's no secret that Americans pay far too much for healthcare. Hospitals charge new moms to hold their babies, ambulance rides can cost thousands of dollars, and insulin can be more than some people's rents. This is not okay. Congress needs to act to solve this crisis, and where they can start is the price of prescription drugs. H.R. 3 would allow Medicare and Medicaid to lower drug prices through negotiation and create price caps for prescription drugs so that Americans don't pay exorbitant prices. We're coming up to our next fundraising deadline. If we're going to be able to continue to keep sharing John's vision for America, we must do everything in our power to hit our goal.

**Read John 's note below and then make a donation to help us get there:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.17_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.17_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.17_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd")**

-Team Delaney
* * *
**From:** John Delaney
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Re:** my opponents aren't telling the truth, folks
**Date:** Friday, November 15, 2019 Friends, I wanted to give you a quick update about where we are in this campaign:

First, I'll be frank -- I'm worried about the state of our party.

**Our Democratic nominee has to be consistently telling the truth -- telling a better -- and _realistic_ \-- story about the future we can share together.**

But there are too many important issues facing the American people today that my fellow candidates are choosing to ignore.

We need universal health care, but why would we force people off plans that they like? And why would we risk hospitals closing when Medicare for All lowers their reimbursement rates? And why would we ignore rural America when Trump's trade policies have given us the opportunity to show that we can offer them a better economic future? When will we stop villainizing businesses and entrepreneurs and instead start focusing on helping workers AND businesses succeed in our economy? And why are Democrats risking four more years of Trump by putting forth half-baked plans that voters will see right through?

_These truths are integral to winning back the White House next November._ [**I 'm committed to continuing to stand by our platform -- but I need to know you stand with me. I can attest that the best economic outcomes are achieved when the government, the private sector, and the nonprofit sector work well together.

We have to stop thinking in silos with "government-only" solutions, or "business-only" solutions, and we have to start living up to our full potential by embracing collaboration and common-sense solutions.

_Collaboration plus common purpose equals progress._

This is what made America the world's greatest superpower, and is what will keep our country prosperous and secure for our children and grandchildren.

Everything from health care reform, gun violence prevention, the opioid crisis, climate change, and the national debt can be addressed by real, common-sense solutions that we can implement if we work together.

**Together, you and me, progressives, moderates, independents, even moderate Republicans... we can get the job done. That 's the solution.**

| | Hello Peter, Donald Trump has filled the White House and executive branch with racists, xenophobes, and white nationalists who use their power to stoke fear of immigrants and hurt communities of color. This week, White House senior adviser Stephen Miller's emails from 2016 surfaced, detailing his adherence to and deep belief of white supremacist conspiracy theories and idealogies. Miller contacted Breitbart writers for 15 months trying to push white supremacist hoaxes and racist stories, focusing hard on stories disparaging immigrants and any non-white people. Now, Stephen Miller has a direct line to the president and is a driving force behind Trump's bigoted immigration policies, including the 2017 Muslim ban and ongoing family separations. Reps. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar, among others, have called for his resignation \-- but unsurprisingly the Trump administration doesn't see anything wrong with being a white nationalist. We couldn't disagree more, and we are calling on Miller to resign immediately but we need to know you think before the GOP tries to spin this with another one of their lies to fool the public: **Should Stephen Miller be forced to resign?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc22/6e9863e8/16686fa9/1db0922a/3958040865/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/pZsHWXAc") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc22/6e9863e8/16686fa9/1db0922a/3958040865/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/pZsHWXAc") Thank you for your response. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc22/6e9863e8/16686fa9/1db09229/3958040865/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191117c.ND-b&refcode2=DLfnk1PvklGQ2f0ISkTe")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: It's time to get rid of the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094f/55b66746/2c83963f/80f210a/3533107688/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The Framers of the Constitution created the Electoral College for two main reasons, both unjust:
1. To boost the voting power of slave states, and
2. To insulate the powerful elite from the will of the people.

And, true to its design, the Electoral College has, over two hundred years, steadily mangled American democracy, directing power away from working people and toward special interests and political insiders. [**Our movement's fighting back. Chip in $3 now to recharge our democracy!**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094f/55b66746/2c83963f/80f210b/3533107688/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-17-abolishec&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Instituting a National Popular Vote would dramatically improve our democracy on day one: **1\. There'd be no more "red states," "blue states," or "swing states."** Imagine, if, instead of fighting over a handful of people in swing states, presidential candidates had to work to win _every_ vote. Americans in states like Massachusetts or Texas would know that their votes mattered just as much as the ones from Florida and Ohio. **2\. We'd make good on the simple promise of**** _one person, one vote_****.** Right now, votes from less populous states count significantly more than those from larger states. In terms of Electoral College impact, a single voter in Wyoming has about _three and a half times_ as much influence as a California voter. **3\. Elections would reflect the will of the people.** In two of the last five presidential elections, the candidate who lost the popular vote still won the presidency. In other words: in the 21st century, our election system has delivered a wrong result _40% of the time._ Our elections work best when all people can participate equally and in good faith. **The Electoral College undermines both the value and the meaning of that participation, without offering any benefit. Hey all, Jordan here, Mike's campaign manager. I just wanted to take a moment and share some of our campaign events from the last week. Mike was busy all over Iowa. He was shaking hand
|

| |

| | Hey all, Jordan here, Mike's campaign manager. I just wanted to take a moment and share some of our campaign events from the last week. Mike was busy all over Iowa: [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874a/3901429514/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
_He was shaking hands in Sioux Center (where he 's from) and Sioux City._ [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874b/3901429514/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
__Mike visiting a veterans' home in Marshalltown_._ [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874b/3901429514/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
__... and (of course) got himself a maid-rite at Taylor's while he was there...__ [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874b/3901429514/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
__On Friday night he attended a meet and greet with over 80 friends and supporters in Ames.__ This is just the beginning, team. He's got plans to hit every part of Iowa, from our growing cities to our world-famous farmland. **[But all this travel has a cost, and Mike is depending on folks like you to chip in and help us spread his message. So, if you can, donate just $5 today.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874b/3901429514/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")** | [Donate](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f241e/33365068/4a63586a/3f8b874a/3901429514/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191117_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
---
Democratically Yours,
Jordan Overstreet
Campaign Manager
